$comment: VELO Design System — provenance + deviations. Generated by the design-system v1.1.0 skill (CREATE mode). Workdir-root meta per protocols/create.md P0 step 4.

L1_source: frontend/src/styles/variables.css (1:1 from velo-mockups, single source of truth for current values)
diary glass world (frozen design anchor: --velo-glass-*, fog, write-frost)
docs/02_design-system/assets/screenshots/ (95 Layer-1 reference screenshots: admin 1, master 39, user 55) — read-only
Figma reference nodes — PENDING (operator to provide before P1.5 / Components phases)

output_shape_deviation.deviation: Dark theme NOT built (Inv 3 mandates Light + Dark).
output_shape_deviation.reason: Operator decision 2026-06-03: VELO is light-only. tokens-dark.css intentionally omitted.
output_shape_deviation.scope: P1/P2 token emit; EXPORT css-vars tokens-dark.css omitted.

output_shape_deviation.deviation: Tokens use the --velo-* namespace, not the skill-canonical --ds-* prefix.
output_shape_deviation.reason: Operator decision 2026-06-03 (VELO-native): --velo-* is a load-bearing contract for the whole app + the frozen diary world; introducing a second prefix would force either a permanent alias layer or a risky mass swap on EXPORT. The skill's value here is the LAYERING (Primitives -> Semantic), applied with our existing names. EXPORT css-vars is then a near-copy into variables.css, zero translation.
output_shape_deviation.scope: all token names; scripts/audit.py prefix checks treated as ADVISORY.

output_shape_deviation.deviation: Elevation effects (elevation-1/2/3) resolve to `none`, not drop-shadows.
output_shape_deviation.reason: Operator decision 2026-06-03 (Hybrid): VELO has a deliberate FLAT source position (all --shadow-* are `none` in variables.css). The only real depth cue is --velo-shadow-glow (welcome). Fabricating drop-shadows would contradict the brand. NOT a missing source — an intentional one.

output_shape_deviation.deviation: Workdir is docs/02_design-system/showcase/ instead of skill default /home/claude/design-system-out/showcase/.
output_shape_deviation.reason: Windows host; docs/02_design-system/ already holds 95 Layer-1 Source screenshots and is the project's DS home.

decisions.motion: Hybrid — full skill scale (5 durations + 4 cubic-bezier easings); our 0.15/0.2/0.3s -> fast/base/slow; instant(0.1s)/slower(0.5s) + cubic-beziers are skill-default fill marked 'no source in VELO'.
decisions.elevation: Flat — elevation-1/2/3 -> none; sole depth = --velo-shadow-glow. See dev-elevation-flat.
decisions.p1_5_motif: DEFERRED to next session. Needs mandala source SVG (vector, not image-fill) + Figma node links from operator.
decisions.catalog_scope: Full 26 (14 Tier-1 + 12 Tier-2), discipline 'extract, don't invent'. Mining 1:1 where VELO has it; skill default in --velo-* tokens marked 'no source' where it doesn't; drop alien Tier-2 on review.
decisions.push: All local; no push until full DS + icons done (joins 3 existing local DS commits).

brand_motif_spec.planned_roles: hero (>=160px, source SVG) / tile (40-140px, structural reduction) / icon (<40px, flat glyph)
brand_motif_spec.blocker: needs mandala source SVG + Figma refs from operator

source_parse.$comment: P0 parse of frontend/src/styles/variables.css — inventory only, no values changed.
source_parse.layout_component_tokens: content-width 336, screen-width 402, rail-pad-x 24, fog z1-z4 20/40/70/90, card-* and banner-* component tokens, nav-* tokens, size-* tokens
